positive: Minimalist line art depicting a celestial map. The design features constellations, stylized moons, and zodiac symbols connected by delicate, flowing lines. Use only deep navy blue and gold ink on a cream background. Highly clean and elegant, suitable for engraving.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, heavy shading, watercolor, messy
